ad_timing.notes: Interstitial fires only at game over (correct break point, every 3rd death). No interstitial between stages. Rewarded ads are all player-initiated on game over screen. Banner shown on menu, hidden during gameplay. Timing is clean. Minor deduction: the interstitial triggers on death #3, #6, #9... but the game over screen loads concurrently rather than holding until interstitial closes - the interstitial fires 900ms after death animation starts, before GameOverScene loads, which is correct ordering.

reward_value.notes: Continue ad gives full life continuation (high value, one per run). Double Fridge Points is a soft currency doubler (meaningful but not game-breaking). Smell Blocker reward is utility-based with 10-wave cooldown enforced correctly. Rewards are well-balanced. Minor deduction: power-up button in HUD activates smell blocker for free without requiring a reward ad - this is an ad bypass opportunity.

technical_integration.notes: All ad hooks fire correctly. Reward callbacks deliver properly. Skip/decline paths work. One-per-run continue lock works and resets on resetRun(). Smell blocker cooldown (10-wave gap) enforced. gameOverCount tracks across sessions. Issue: resetRun() only resets continueUsedThisRun, not gameOverCount - interstitial counter persists across menu/new runs (minor). Console errors are all Phaser texture key collisions (item_milk, item_juice, etc.) from texture re-registration bug - not ad-related but indicates a game stability issue. No ad-specific console errors. Banner placeholder is a no-op (expected for placeholder implementation).

issues.description: Power-up button in bottom HUD gives 'Smell Blocker 3 waves' for free without any ad. This undercuts the showRewardedSmellBlocker() hook which is never called from game code.
resetRun() does not reset gameOverCount. Interstitial counter persists across full play sessions (menu -> game -> menu -> game). Should reset on new run start.
showRewardedSmellBlocker() is defined in AdManager but never called from game code. The smell blocker reward ad is unreachable in normal gameplay - only the free power-up button exists.
57 console errors observed - all are Phaser 'Texture key already in use' errors from item texture re-registration across scene restarts. Not ad-related but impacts overall game health.

Interstitial fires every 3rd game over (deaths 3, 6, 9...) which is within standard tolerance. Standard is max 1 per 3 stages - this implementation uses game overs as the trigger unit which is acceptable.

interstitial.placement: Between game over animation and GameOverScene load
interstitial.verdict: PASS - correct break point, not forced mid-game

rewarded_continue.label: WATCH AD TO CONTINUE
rewarded_continue.verdict: PASS - clear label, player-initiated, limited fairly

rewarded_smell_blocker.trigger: Never called in game code (defined but unused)
rewarded_smell_blocker.label: Watch ad for Smell Blocker?
rewarded_smell_blocker.verdict: FAIL - hook unreachable; replaced by free power-up button

banner.verdict: PASS - correctly shown only in menu, hidden during gameplay

summary: Fridge Tetris has a solid ad integration for a placeholder implementation. All three reward ad flows (continue, double points, smell blocker) and one interstitial are correctly placed at natural break points. Reward delivery works correctly, skip paths work, one-per-run limits are enforced, and no dark patterns are present. Main issues: the smell blocker reward ad (defined in AdManager) is unreachable because the free power-up button in HUD handles the same feature; resetRun() does not reset the interstitial counter; and 56 Phaser texture errors indicate a game stability bug (not ad-related). Score: 7.65/10.
